programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: A new team commander emerges, but can they hold the title? Contestants face long-range shooting challenges, mastering both standard artillery and the powerful 50 Caliber rifle. The intensity continues with surprise physical training led by a SEAL Team 6 warrior and MMA Champion, pushing contestants to their breaking point. This episode is a relentless test of endurance, skill, and resilience, as the competition intensifies and only the most determined will claim the title of Ultimate Competition Lead.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: A group of 5 All Star contestants were chosen to embark on an adventure overseas, but what they didn’t know is that it would become a maritime mission. Radio Host Kerri Kasem and rockstar Ashba join Don as he breaks the news to the contestants that there’s more to this yacht than a pleasure cruise. If they thought that this trip was going to be smooth sailing, they soon realized how mistaken they were when Don hit them with the hardest physical evolution in Surviving Mann’s history.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: When the CIA calls, the All-Stars answer. The team is tasked with sabotaging a drug-smuggling boat before it can make its shipment. With mission success hanging in the balance, the All-Stars take their training up a notch, starting with a lesson in maritime navigation. From there, the contestants practice their tactical cast and turtleback swimming, but things take a turn when the contestants partake in a mile race against the current. Who will win and prove their water proficiency?

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: It’s go time. The mission day has come and the All-Stars have to rendezvous on a nearby island to pick up their supplies. When it comes to gear, Don pulls out all the stops to ensure mission success. From water jets and state-of-the-art fins to maximize speed, to finding a creative way to keep his team lethally armed without breaking any laws.. Don has a few surprises in store for the All-Stars.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With a successful mission under their belts, the team of All Stars can relax and enjoy a day of diving.. or so they thought. The CIA is calling the team back into action for a VBSS mission to secure deadly poisons that are inbound for civilians. If the team thought the previous mission was challenging, this one makes it look like a cake walk. The All Stars must call upon all their training thus far to make it through this mission, when an unknown element threatens to jeopardize it and them.

With mission success hanging in the balance, the All-Stars take their training up a notch, starting with a lesson in maritime navigation. From there, the contestants practice their tactical cast and turtleback swimming, but things take a turn when the contestants partake in a mile race against the current. Who will win and prove their water proficiency?

programme.title: All Stars

When it comes to gear, Don pulls out all the stops to ensure mission success. From water jets and state-of-the-art fins to maximize speed, to finding a creative way to keep his team lethally armed without breaking any laws.. Don has a few surprises in store for the All-Stars.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With a successful mission under their belts, the team of All Stars can relax and enjoy a day of diving.. or so they thought. The CIA is calling the team back into action for a VBSS mission to secure deadly poisons that are inbound for civilians. The All Stars must call upon all their training thus far to make it through this mission, when an unknown element threatens to jeopardize it and them.

programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.
